mapper.sql: spss.id, spss.income_period, spss.work_card, spss.employee_name, spss.employee_category, spss.division_contract_flag, spss.administrative_office, spss.department, spss.bank_account, spss.bank_name, round(spss.post_skill_salary,2) as post_skill_salary, round(spss.seniority_allowance,2) as seniority_allowance, round(spss.one_child_subsidy,2) as one_child_subsidy, round(spss.high_temperature_subsidy,2) as high_temperature_subsidy, round(spss.transportation_allowance,2) as transportation_allowance, round(spss.post_subsidy,2) as post_subsidy, round(spss.overtime_pay,2) as overtime_pay, round(spss.holiday_overtime_pay,2) as holiday_overtime_pay, round(spss.rest_overtime_pay,2) as rest_overtime_pay, round(spss.allowance_deduction,2) as allowance_deduction, round(spss.wages_payable,2) as wages_payable, round(spss.deduct_medical_costs,2) as deduct_medical_costs, round(spss.deduct_hydropower_house,2) as deduct_hydropower_house, round(spss.deduct_income_tax,2) as deduct_income_tax, round(spss.personal_deductibles,2) as personal_deductibles, round(spss.personal_deduct_accumulation_fund,2) as personal_deduct_accumulation_fund, round(spss.deduct_other,2) as deduct_other, round(spss.company_deductibles,2) as company_deductibles, round(spss.company_deduct_accumulation_fund,2) as company_deduct_accumulation_fund, spss.cost_center, spss.cost_center_num, spss.service_department, spss.attribute1, spss.attribute2, spss.attribute3, spss.attribute4, spss.attribute5, spss.net_payment, spss.frozen_flag, spss.create_time, spss.create_by, spss.update_time, spss.update_by, round(spss.safety_accumulation_award,2) as safety_accumulation_award, spss.se_id, spss.enabled_flag, spss.grant_flag, spss.team, spss.station, spss.overtime_pay_time, spss.holiday_overtime_pay_time, spss.rest_overtime_pay_time, spss.special_import_flag

${tAlias}.id as ${tAlias}_id, ${tAlias}.income_period as ${tAlias}_income_period, ${tAlias}.work_card as ${tAlias}_work_card, ${tAlias}.employee_name as ${tAlias}_employee_name, ${tAlias}.employee_category as ${tAlias}_employee_category, ${tAlias}.division_contract_flag as ${tAlias}_division_contract_flag, ${tAlias}.administrative_office as ${tAlias}_administrative_office, ${tAlias}.department as ${tAlias}_department, ${tAlias}.bank_account as ${tAlias}_bank_account, ${tAlias}.bank_name as ${tAlias}_bank_name, ${tAlias}.post_skill_salary as ${tAlias}_post_skill_salary, ${tAlias}.seniority_allowance as ${tAlias}_seniority_allowance, ${tAlias}.one_child_subsidy as ${tAlias}_one_child_subsidy, ${tAlias}.high_temperature_subsidy as ${tAlias}_high_temperature_subsidy, ${tAlias}.transportation_allowance as ${tAlias}_transportation_allowance, ${tAlias}.post_subsidy as ${tAlias}_post_subsidy, ${tAlias}.overtime_pay as ${tAlias}_overtime_pay, ${tAlias}.holiday_overtime_pay as ${tAlias}_holiday_overtime_pay, ${tAlias}.rest_overtime_pay as ${tAlias}_rest_overtime_pay, ${tAlias}.allowance_deduction as ${tAlias}_allowance_deduction, ${tAlias}.wages_payable as ${tAlias}_wages_payable, ${tAlias}.deduct_medical_costs as ${tAlias}_deduct_medical_costs, ${tAlias}.deduct_hydropower_house as ${tAlias}_deduct_hydropower_house, ${tAlias}.deduct_income_tax as ${tAlias}_deduct_income_tax, ${tAlias}.personal_deductibles as ${tAlias}_personal_deductibles, ${tAlias}.personal_deduct_accumulation_fund as ${tAlias}_personal_deduct_accumulation_fund, ${tAlias}.deduct_other as ${tAlias}_deduct_other, ${tAlias}.company_deductibles as ${tAlias}_company_deductibles, ${tAlias}.company_deduct_accumulation_fund as ${tAlias}_company_deduct_accumulation_fund, ${tAlias}.cost_center as ${tAlias}_cost_center, ${tAlias}.cost_center_num as ${tAlias}_cost_center_num, ${tAlias}.service_department as ${tAlias}_service_department, ${tAlias}.attribute1 as ${tAlias}_attribute1, ${tAlias}.attribute2 as ${tAlias}_attribute2, ${tAlias}.attribute3 as ${tAlias}_attribute3, ${tAlias}.attribute4 as ${tAlias}_attribute4, ${tAlias}.attribute5 as ${tAlias}_attribute5, ${tAlias}.net_payment as ${tAlias}_net_payment, ${tAlias}.frozen_flag as ${tAlias}_frozen_flag, ${tAlias}.create_time as ${tAlias}_create_time, ${tAlias}.create_by as ${tAlias}_create_by, ${tAlias}.update_time as ${tAlias}_update_time, ${tAlias}.update_by as ${tAlias}_update_by, ${tAlias}.safety_accumulation_award as ${tAlias}_safety_accumulation_award, ${tAlias}.se_id as ${tAlias}_se_id, ${tAlias}.enabled_flag as ${tAlias}_enabled_flag, ${tAlias}.grant_flag as ${tAlias}_grant_flag, ${tAlias}.team as ${tAlias}_team, ${tAlias}.station as ${tAlias}_station, ${tAlias}.overtime_pay_time as ${tAlias}_overtime_pay_time, ${tAlias}.holiday_overtime_pay_time as ${tAlias}_holiday_overtime_pay_time, ${tAlias}.rest_overtime_pay_time as ${tAlias}_rest_overtime_pay_time, ${tAlias}.special_import_flag as ${tAlias}_special_import_flag

select
, (select isnull(pe.name, '') from fnd_user fu join pm_employee pe on fu.employee_id = pe.id and fu.id = spss.update_by where fu.enabled_flag =1 and pe.enabled_flag = 1) as update_by_str from swm_post_skill_salary spss
mapper.insert: insert into swm_post_skill_salary (income_period, work_card, employee_name, employee_category, division_contract_flag, administrative_office, department, bank_account, bank_name, post_skill_salary, seniority_allowance, one_child_subsidy, high_temperature_subsidy, transportation_allowance, post_subsidy, overtime_pay, holiday_overtime_pay, rest_overtime_pay, allowance_deduction, wages_payable, deduct_medical_costs, deduct_hydropower_house, deduct_income_tax, personal_deductibles, personal_deduct_accumulation_fund, deduct_other, company_deductibles, company_deduct_accumulation_fund, cost_center, cost_center_num, service_department, attribute1, attribute2, attribute3, attribute4, attribute5, net_payment, frozen_flag, create_time, create_by, update_time, update_by, safety_accumulation_award, se_id, enabled_flag, grant_flag, team, station ) values (#{incomePeriod,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{workCard,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{employeeName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{employeeCategory,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{divisionContractFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, #{administrativeOffice,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{department,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{bankAccount,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{bankName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{postSkillSalary,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{seniorityAllowance,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{oneChildSubsidy,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{highTemperatureSubsidy,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{transportationAllowance,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{postSubsidy,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{overtimePay,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{holidayOvertimePay,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{restOvertimePay,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{allowanceDeduction,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{wagesPayable,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{deductMedicalCosts,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{deductHydropowerHouse,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{deductIncomeTax,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{personalDeductibles,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{personalDeductAccumulationFund,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{deductOther,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{companyDeductibles,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{companyDeductAccumulationFund,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{costCenter,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{costCenterNum,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{serviceDepartment,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{attribute1,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{attribute2,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{attribute3,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{attribute4,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{attribute5,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{netPayment,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{frozenFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{createBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{safetyAccumulationAward,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{seId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{enabledFlag, jdbcType= BIT}, #{grantFlag, jdbcType= BIT}, #{team, jdbcType = VARCHAR}, #{station, jdbcType = VARCHAR} )
mapper.update: update swm_post_skill_salary set enabled_flag = 0, update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, update_by = #{updateBy,jdbcType=BIGINT} where income_period = #{incomePeriod, jdbcType = VARCHAR} and frozen_flag = 0 and enabled_flag = 1
update swm_post_skill_salary set ${criteria.colName} = #{criteria.price, jdbcType = NUMERIC} where income_period = #{criteria.period , jdbcType = VARCHAR} and enabled_flag = 1
mapper.insert:
insert into swm_post_skill_salary (income_period, work_card, employee_name, employee_category, division_contract_flag, administrative_office, department, bank_account, bank_name, post_skill_salary, seniority_allowance, one_child_subsidy, high_temperature_subsidy, transportation_allowance, post_subsidy, overtime_pay, holiday_overtime_pay, rest_overtime_pay, allowance_deduction, deduct_medical_costs, deduct_hydropower_house,
deduct_income_tax, personal_deductibles, personal_deduct_accumulation_fund, deduct_other, company_deductibles, company_deduct_accumulation_fund, cost_center, cost_center_num, service_department, frozen_flag, create_time, create_by, update_time, update_by, safety_accumulation_award, se_id, enabled_flag, grant_flag, team, station ) select #{period, jdbcType = VARCHAR}, se.work_card, se.name, se.employee_category, se.division_contract_flag, se.administrative_office, se.department, se.bank_account, se.bank_name, round(se.post_skill_salary,2), round(se.seniority_allowance,2), round(se.one_child_subsidy,2), round(se.high_temperature_subsidy,2),round(se.transportation_allowance,2), round(se.post_subsidy,2), 0, 0, 0, 0, 0, 0, 0, round(se.personal_deductibles,2), round(se.personal_deduct_accumulation_fund,2), 0, round(se.company_deductibles,2), round(se.company_deduct_accumulation_fund,2), se.cost_center, se.cost_center_num, se.service_department, 0, getdate(), -1, getdate(), -1, round(se.safety_accumulation_award,2), se.id, 1, 0, se.team, se.station from swm_employee se where se.work_flag = 1
mapper.update: update swm_post_skill_salary set income_period = #{incomePeriod,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, work_card = #{workCard,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, employee_name = #{employeeName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, employee_category = #{employeeCategory,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, division_contract_flag = #{divisionContractFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, administrative_office = #{administrativeOffice,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, department = #{department,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, bank_account = #{bankAccount,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, bank_name = #{bankName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, post_skill_salary = #{postSkillSalary,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, seniority_allowance = #{seniorityAllowance,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, one_child_subsidy = #{oneChildSubsidy,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, high_temperature_subsidy = #{highTemperatureSubsidy,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, transportation_allowance = #{transportationAllowance,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, post_subsidy = #{postSubsidy,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, allowance_deduction = #{allowanceDeduction,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, wages_payable = #{wagesPayable,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, deduct_medical_costs = #{deductMedicalCosts,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, deduct_hydropower_house = #{deductHydropowerHouse,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, deduct_income_tax = #{deductIncomeTax,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, personal_deductibles = #{personalDeductibles,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, personal_deduct_accumulation_fund = #{personalDeductAccumulationFund,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, deduct_other = #{deductOther,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, company_deductibles = #{companyDeductibles,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, company_deduct_accumulation_fund = #{companyDeductAccumulationFund,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, cost_center = #{costCenter,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, cost_center_num = #{costCenterNum,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, service_department = #{serviceDepartment,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, attribute1 = #{attribute1,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, attribute2 = #{attribute2,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, attribute3 = #{attribute3,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, attribute4 = #{attribute4,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, attribute5 = #{attribute5,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, net_payment = #{netPayment,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, frozen_flag = #{frozenFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, update_by = #{updateBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, safety_accumulation_award = #{safetyAccumulationAward,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, se_id = #{seId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, enabled_flag = #{enabledFlag, jdbcType = BIT}, grant_flag = #{grantFlag, jdbcType = BIT}, team = #{team, jdbcType = VARCHAR}, station = #{station, jdbcType = VARCHAR}, overtime_pay = case when #{specialImportFlag, jdbcType = BIT} = 1 then #{overtimePay, jdbcType = DECIMAL} else case when #{overtimePayTime, jdbcType = DECIMAL} is null or #{overtimePayTime, jdbcType = DECIMAL} = 0 then 0 else case when se_t.employee_category <> '03' and se_t.station <> '驾驶员' then ( select isnull(se.lump_sum_wage,0) + isnull(se.base_pay,0) + isnull(se.post_skill_salary,0) + isnull(se.target_performance_pay, 0) + isnull(se.seniority_allowance, 0) from swm_employee se where se.work_card = RIGHT ( cast( '000000' + rtrim( #{workCard, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ) AS VARCHAR ), 6 )) / 21.75 / 8 * 1.5 * #{overtimePayTime, jdbcType = DECIMAL} else case when right(#{incomePeriod, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 2) <> '01' then (select (sum(swsf.wages_payable_post) - sum(isnull(swsf.safety_accumulation_award, 0)) - sum(isnull(swsf.high_temperature_subsidy, 0)) - sum(isnull(swsf.transportation_allowance,0)) - sum(isnull(swsf.post_subsidy, 0)) - sum(isnull(swsf.overtime_pay, 0))) / (select count(1) from swm_wage_summary_file swsf_t where left( swsf_t.income_period, 4) = left(#{incomePeriod, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ,4) and swsf_t.work_card = RIGHT ( cast( '000000' + rtrim( #{workCard, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ) AS VARCHAR ), 6 )) / 21.75 / 8 * 1.5 * #{overtimePayTime, jdbcType = DECIMAL} from swm_wage_summary_file swsf where left(swsf.income_period, 4) = left(#{incomePeriod, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ,4) and swsf.work_card = RIGHT ( cast( '000000' + rtrim( #{workCard, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ) AS VARCHAR ), 6 ) ) else (select (sum(swsf.wages_payable_post) - sum(isnull(swsf.safety_accumulation_award, 0)) - sum(isnull(swsf.high_temperature_subsidy, 0)) - sum(isnull(swsf.transportation_allowance,0)) - sum(isnull(swsf.post_subsidy, 0)) - sum(isnull(swsf.overtime_pay, 0))) / (select count(1) from swm_wage_summary_file swsf_t where left( swsf_t.income_period, 4) = convert(varchar(4), (convert(int, left(#{incomePeriod, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ,4)) - 1)) and swsf_t.work_card = RIGHT ( cast( '000000' + rtrim( #{workCard, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ) AS VARCHAR ), 6 )) / 21.75 / 8 * 1.5 * #{overtimePayTime, jdbcType = DECIMAL} from swm_wage_summary_file swsf where left( swsf.income_period, 4) = convert(varchar(4), (convert(int, left(#{incomePeriod, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ,4)) - 1)) and swsf.work_card = RIGHT ( cast( '000000' + rtrim( #{workCard, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ) AS VARCHAR ), 6 ) ) end end end end, holiday_overtime_pay = case when #{specialImportFlag, jdbcType = BIT} = 1 then #{holidayOvertimePay, jdbcType = DECIMAL} else case when #{holidayOvertimePayTime, jdbcType = DECIMAL} is null or #{holidayOvertimePayTime, jdbcType = DECIMAL} = 0 then 0 else case when se_t.employee_category <> '03' and se_t.station <> '驾驶员' then ( select isnull(se.lump_sum_wage,0) + isnull(se.base_pay,0) + isnull(se.post_skill_salary,0) + isnull(se.target_performance_pay, 0) + isnull(se.seniority_allowance, 0) from swm_employee se where se.work_card = RIGHT ( cast( '000000' + rtrim( #{workCard, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ) AS VARCHAR ), 6 )) / 21.75 / 8 * 3 * #{holidayOvertimePayTime, jdbcType = DECIMAL} else case when right(#{incomePeriod, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 2) <> '01' then (select (sum(swsf.wages_payable_post) - sum(isnull(swsf.safety_accumulation_award, 0)) - sum(isnull(swsf.high_temperature_subsidy, 0)) - sum(isnull(swsf.transportation_allowance,0)) - sum(isnull(swsf.post_subsidy, 0)) - sum(isnull(swsf.overtime_pay, 0))) / (select count(1) from swm_wage_summary_file swsf_t where left( swsf_t.income_period, 4) = left(#{incomePeriod, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ,4) and swsf_t.work_card = RIGHT ( cast( '000000' + rtrim( #{workCard, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ) AS VARCHAR ), 6 )) / 21.75 / 8 * 3 * #{holidayOvertimePayTime, jdbcType = DECIMAL} from swm_wage_summary_file swsf where left(swsf.income_period, 4) = left(#{incomePeriod, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ,4) and swsf.work_card = RIGHT ( cast( '000000' + rtrim( #{workCard, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ) AS VARCHAR ), 6 ) ) else (select (sum(swsf.wages_payable_post) - sum(isnull(swsf.safety_accumulation_award, 0)) - sum(isnull(swsf.high_temperature_subsidy, 0)) - sum(isnull(swsf.transportation_allowance,0)) - sum(isnull(swsf.post_subsidy, 0)) - sum(isnull(swsf.overtime_pay, 0))) / (select count(1) from swm_wage_summary_file swsf_t where left( swsf_t.income_period, 4) = convert(varchar(4), (convert(int, left(#{incomePeriod, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ,4)) - 1)) and swsf_t.work_card = RIGHT ( cast( '000000' + rtrim( #{workCard, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ) AS VARCHAR ), 6 )) / 21.75 / 8 * 3 * #{holidayOvertimePayTime, jdbcType = DECIMAL} from swm_wage_summary_file swsf where left( swsf.income_period, 4) = convert(varchar(4), (convert(int, left(#{incomePeriod, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ,4)) - 1)) and swsf.work_card = RIGHT ( cast( '000000' + rtrim( #{workCard, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ) AS VARCHAR ), 6 ) ) end end end end, rest_overtime_pay = case when #{specialImportFlag, jdbcType = BIT} = 1 then #{restOvertimePay, jdbcType = DECIMAL} else case when #{restOvertimePayTime, jdbcType = DECIMAL} is null or #{restOvertimePayTime, jdbcType = DECIMAL} = 0 then 0 else case when se_t.employee_category <> '03' and se_t.station <> '驾驶员' then ( select isnull(se.lump_sum_wage,0) + isnull(se.base_pay,0) + isnull(se.post_skill_salary,0) + isnull(se.target_performance_pay, 0) + isnull(se.seniority_allowance, 0) from swm_employee se where se.work_card = RIGHT ( cast( '000000' + rtrim( #{workCard, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ) AS VARCHAR ), 6 )) / 21.75 / 8 * 2 * (#{restOvertimePayTime, jdbcType = DECIMAL}) else case when right(#{incomePeriod, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 2) <> '01' then (select (sum(swsf.wages_payable_post) - sum(isnull(swsf.safety_accumulation_award, 0)) - sum(isnull(swsf.high_temperature_subsidy, 0)) - sum(isnull(swsf.transportation_allowance,0)) - sum(isnull(swsf.post_subsidy, 0)) - sum(isnull(swsf.overtime_pay, 0))) / (select count(1) from swm_wage_summary_file swsf_t where left( swsf_t.income_period, 4) = left(#{incomePeriod, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ,4) and swsf_t.work_card = RIGHT ( cast( '000000' + rtrim( #{workCard, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ) AS VARCHAR ), 6 )) / 21.75 / 8 * 2 * (#{restOvertimePayTime, jdbcType = DECIMAL}) from swm_wage_summary_file swsf where left(swsf.income_period, 4) = left(#{incomePeriod, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ,4) and swsf.work_card = RIGHT ( cast( '000000' + rtrim( #{workCard, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ) AS VARCHAR ), 6 ) ) else (select (sum(swsf.wages_payable_post) - sum(isnull(swsf.safety_accumulation_award, 0)) - sum(isnull(swsf.high_temperature_subsidy, 0)) - sum(isnull(swsf.transportation_allowance,0)) - sum(isnull(swsf.post_subsidy, 0)) - sum(isnull(swsf.overtime_pay, 0))) / (select count(1) from swm_wage_summary_file swsf_t where left( swsf_t.income_period, 4) = convert(varchar(4), (convert(int, left(#{incomePeriod, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ,4)) - 1)) and swsf_t.work_card = RIGHT ( cast( '000000' + rtrim( #{workCard, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ) AS VARCHAR ), 6 )) / 21.75 / 8 * 2 * (#{restOvertimePayTime, jdbcType = DECIMAL}) from swm_wage_summary_file swsf where left( swsf.income_period, 4) = convert(varchar(4), (convert(int, left(#{incomePeriod, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ,4)) - 1)) and swsf.work_card = RIGHT ( cast( '000000' + rtrim( #{workCard, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ) AS VARCHAR ), 6 ) ) end end end end, overtime_pay_time = #{overtimePayTime,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, holiday_overtime_pay_time = #{holidayOvertimePayTime,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, rest_overtime_pay_time = #{restOvertimePayTime,jdbcType=DECIMAL} from swm_employee se_t join swm_post_skill_salary spss on spss.se_id = se_t.id and se_t.work_flag = 1 and spss.id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT} and isnull(spss.frozen_flag, 0) = 0 left join ac_overtime_leave aol on aol.employee_id = se_t.employee_id and spss.income_period = aol.date_str and aol.enabled_flag = 1
mapper.select: select (select case when ((select count(1) from swm_employee se where se.employee_category is null or se.employee_category not in ('00','01','02','03','04','05','06','07')) > 0) then '员工信息中“人员类别”数据有问题，请检查。' else '' end) as check_employee_category, (select case when ((select count(1) from swm_employee se where se.division_contract_flag = 0 and se.post_skill_salary is null and se.employee_category in ('01','02','05','07')) > 0) then '员工信息数据问题，非包干人员的岗位技能工资为空，系统无法继续计算。' else '' end) as check_not_division_contract_flag1, (select case when ((select count(1) from swm_employee se where se.division_contract_flag = 0 and se.base_pay is null and se.employee_category in ('03','04')) > 0) then '员工信息数据问题，司机、保安的月基本工资为空，系统无法继续计算。' else '' end ) as check_not_division_contract_flag2, (select case when ((select count(1) from swm_employee se where se.division_contract_flag = 1 and se.lump_sum_wage is null) > 0) then '员工信息数据问题，包干人员的包干工资为空，系统无法继续计算。' else '' end ) as check_is_division_contract_flag
select top 1 spss.income_period from swm_post_skill_salary spss where spss.enabled_flag = 1 order by spss.id desc
select count(1) from swm_post_skill_salary spss where spss.enabled_flag = 1 and spss.frozen_flag = 1 and spss.income_period = #{incomePeriod, jdbcType = VARCHAR}
mapper.update: UPDATE spss SET overtime_pay = case when spssi.overtime_pay is not null then spssi.overtime_pay else spss.overtime_pay end, holiday_overtime_pay = case when spssi.holiday_overtime_pay is not null then spssi.holiday_overtime_pay else spss.holiday_overtime_pay end, rest_overtime_pay = case when spssi.rest_overtime_pay is not null then spssi.rest_overtime_pay else spss.rest_overtime_pay end, deduct_income_tax = case when spssi.deduct_income_tax is not null then spssi.deduct_income_tax else spss.deduct_income_tax end, safety_accumulation_award = case when spssi.safety_accumulation_award is not null then spssi.safety_accumulation_award else spss.safety_accumulation_award end, high_temperature_subsidy = case when spssi.high_temperature_subsidy is not null then spssi.high_temperature_subsidy else spss.high_temperature_subsidy end, allowance_deduction = case when spssi.allowance_deduction is not null then spssi.allowance_deduction else spss.allowance_deduction end, deduct_other = case when spssi.deduct_other is not null then spssi.deduct_other else spss.deduct_other end, overtime_pay_time = case when spssi.overtime_pay_time is not null then spssi.overtime_pay_time else spss.overtime_pay_time end, holiday_overtime_pay_time = case when spssi.holiday_overtime_pay_time is not null then spssi.holiday_overtime_pay_time else spss.holiday_overtime_pay_time end, rest_overtime_pay_time = case when spssi.rest_overtime_pay_time is not null then spssi.rest_overtime_pay_time else spss.rest_overtime_pay_time end, transportation_allowance = case when spssi.transportation_allowance is not null then spssi.transportation_allowance else spss.transportation_allowance end, deduct_hydropower_house = case when spssi.deduct_hydropower_house is not null then spssi.deduct_hydropower_house else spss.deduct_hydropower_house end, update_time = getDate(), update_by = spssi.update_by, special_import_flag = spssi.special_import_flag FROM swm_post_skill_salary_interface spssi join swm_post_skill_salary spss on RIGHT ( cast( '000000' + rtrim( spss.work_card ) AS VARCHAR ), 6 ) = RIGHT ( cast( '000000' + rtrim( spssi.work_card ) AS VARCHAR ), 6 ) and spssi.group_id = #{groupId, jdbcType = BIGINT} AND spssi.employee_id != - 1 AND spssi.data_status = 'T' AND spssi.income_period = spss.income_period and isnull(spss.frozen_flag, 0) = 0

UPDATE swm_post_skill_salary SET wages_payable = isnull(round(spss.post_skill_salary,2), 0) + isnull(round(spss.seniority_allowance,2), 0) + isnull(round(spss.one_child_subsidy,2), 0) + isnull(round(spss.safety_accumulation_award,2), 0) + isnull(round(spss.high_temperature_subsidy,2), 0) + isnull(round(spss.transportation_allowance,2), 0) + isnull(round(spss.post_subsidy,2), 0) + isnull(round(spss.overtime_pay,2), 0) + isnull(round(spss.holiday_overtime_pay,2), 0) + isnull(round(spss.rest_overtime_pay,2), 0) + isnull(round(spss.allowance_deduction,2), 0), net_payment = isnull(round(spss.post_skill_salary,2), 0) + isnull(round(spss.seniority_allowance,2), 0) + isnull(round(spss.one_child_subsidy,2), 0) + isnull(round(spss.safety_accumulation_award,2), 0) + isnull(round(spss.high_temperature_subsidy,2), 0) + isnull(round(spss.transportation_allowance,2), 0) + isnull(round(spss.post_subsidy,2), 0) + isnull(round(spss.overtime_pay,2), 0) + isnull(round(spss.holiday_overtime_pay,2), 0) + isnull(round(spss.rest_overtime_pay,2), 0) + isnull(round(spss.allowance_deduction,2), 0) - isnull(round(spss.deduct_medical_costs,2), 0) - isnull(round(spss.deduct_hydropower_house,2), 0) - isnull(round(spss.deduct_income_tax,2), 0) - isnull(round(spss.personal_deductibles,2), 0) - isnull(round(spss.personal_deduct_accumulation_fund,2), 0) - isnull(round(spss.deduct_other,2), 0) from swm_post_skill_salary_interface spssi , swm_post_skill_salary spss WHERE spssi.group_id = #{groupId, jdbcType = BIGINT} AND RIGHT ( cast( '000000' + rtrim( spss.work_card ) AS VARCHAR ), 6 ) = RIGHT ( cast( '000000' + rtrim( spssi.work_card ) AS VARCHAR ), 6 ) AND spssi.employee_id != - 1 AND spssi.data_status = 'T' AND spssi.income_period = spss.income_period

update spss set deduct_income_tax = spit.amount_tax_refund from swm_post_skill_salary spss join swm_personal_income_tax spit on spss.income_period = spit.income_period and spss.income_period = #{incomePeriod, jdbcType = VARCHAR} and spss.enabled_flag = 1 and spit.enabled_flag = 1 and spss.se_id = spit.se_id and spit.se_id <> -1 and spss.work_card = spit.work_card

update swm_post_skill_salary SET wages_payable = isnull(round(spss.post_skill_salary,2), 0) + isnull(round(spss.seniority_allowance,2), 0) + isnull(round(spss.one_child_subsidy,2), 0) + isnull(round(spss.safety_accumulation_award,2), 0) + isnull(round(spss.high_temperature_subsidy,2), 0) + isnull(round(spss.transportation_allowance,2), 0) + isnull(round(spss.post_subsidy,2), 0) + isnull(round(spss.overtime_pay,2), 0) + isnull(round(spss.holiday_overtime_pay,2), 0) + isnull(round(spss.rest_overtime_pay,2), 0) + isnull(round(spss.allowance_deduction,2), 0), net_payment = isnull(round(spss.post_skill_salary,2), 0) + isnull(round(spss.seniority_allowance,2), 0) + isnull(round(spss.one_child_subsidy,2), 0) + isnull(round(spss.safety_accumulation_award,2), 0) + isnull(round(spss.high_temperature_subsidy,2), 0) + isnull(round(spss.transportation_allowance,2), 0) + isnull(round(spss.post_subsidy,2), 0) + isnull(round(spss.overtime_pay,2), 0) + isnull(round(spss.holiday_overtime_pay,2), 0) + isnull(round(spss.rest_overtime_pay,2), 0) + isnull(round(spss.allowance_deduction,2), 0) - isnull(round(spss.deduct_medical_costs,2), 0) - isnull(round(spss.deduct_hydropower_house,2), 0) - isnull(round(spss.deduct_income_tax,2), 0) - isnull(round(spss.personal_deductibles,2), 0) - isnull(round(spss.personal_deduct_accumulation_fund,2), 0) - isnull(round(spss.deduct_other,2), 0) from swm_post_skill_salary spss where spss.income_period = #{incomePeriod, jdbcType = VARCHAR} and spss.enabled_flag = 1
